fato_historico: 1983: The first three-dimensional reconstruction of a human head in a CT is published.
energia_do_dia: The cosmos invites you to see your essence from a fresh angle, much like the first detailed vision of a structure revealed through light. It is a good time to consider your inner patterns with kindness. Perhaps you may find that shifting your focus brings clarity, as hidden layers of your own brilliance begin to shine bright.
frase_do_dia: See yourself with the wonder of a newfound discovery today.
significado_numero: The number of independent beginnings and fresh mental insights.
conselho: Trust your intuition and look at your challenges from a different vantage point.
